name: centromere_architecture
description: Architecture record for S. pombe centromeres. Each of cen1/cen2/cen3 follows the same three-domain pattern: cnt (central core, unique, CENP-A^Cnp1-loaded) flanked by imr (innermost repeats with tRNA boundary clusters) flanked by otr (outer dg/dh tandem cassettes silenced by Clr4/Swi6-HP1). Centromere size ranges 35-110 kb, almost entirely driven by otr expansion (cen3 > cen2 > cen1). dg and dh repeats are shared across all three centromeres, so reads to otr cannot be assigned to a specific chromosome without PSVs.

architecture.internal_structure: cnt (unique) - imr (tRNA-bounded) - otr (dg/dh tandem cassettes); cen1 ~35 kb / cen2 ~65 kb / cen3 ~110 kb
